Node.description: Object to provide certain services related to Chassis and port CPUs.
Node.help: ChassisConfig object provides services to obtain Chassis and port configuration information, perform certain functions on the ports like takeOwnership, reboot port cpu etc.,, and configure port's layer1 parameters.

PropertyNodeList.name: chassisChain
PropertyNodeList.description: The chassis chain object containing information about chassis chain.

PropertyBoolean.name: useConfigLayerV2
PropertyBoolean.description: Boolean to indicate whether to use ConfigLayerV2 for TestConfigure

Struct.name: PortAddress
Struct.help: Structure to hold information about the complete address of a port in a chassis.

Member.name: cardId
Member.help: Identifier of the card the port belongs to.

Enum.name: eLinkState

Choice.help: Represent the port Link up state.
Represent port Loop back state.
Represent the port Link pppUp state.
Represent the port Link down state.

Enum.help: Value of the port link state

Enum.name: eLayer1Type

Choice.help: Generic type neither ethernet nor ATM.
Basic Ethernet card type that only has autoNegotiate.
Card is of type SFPS4.
Card has only Fiber type.
Generic ethernet card like TXS4, TXS8 and ALM.
Card of ELM type which has master/slave.
Card of type STXS4 with Copper/Fiber options.
Basic Gigabit Ethernet type.
Card of XAUI type.
Card of XenPAk type.
Card to represnt generic Sonet type.
ATM type card.
POS type card or ATM card in POS Mode.
Card in 10 Gigabit LAN ethernet mode.
Card in 10 gigabit WAN ethernet mode.

Enum.help: The Layer1 type of the card.

Choice.help: a text file suitable for import into a database.
a binary format for use with IxExplorer's File Import function.
a binary format for use with NAI's Sniffer program (Snifer 4.x).
a binary format for use with NAI's Sniffer program (Snifer 1.x).

List.name: Layer1TypeList
List.help: List of enumerators of type eLayer1Type.

Struct.name: Port
Struct.help: Structure to hold information about a port.

Member.name: portAddr
Member.help: Embedded structure containing port Address information.

Member.name: linkSt
Member.help: The link state of the port.

Member.name: speed
Member.help: The link speed of the port.

Member.name: duplex
Member.help: The duplex of the port(either half or full).

Member.name: uniquePortNo
Member.help: The unique identifier used to identify the port. It is unique to the chassis/card/port combination.

Member.name: layer1Class
Member.help: String representing the layer1 class of the port. This can be Ethernet, ATM or POS.

Member.name: allowedLayer1Type
Member.help: List of layer1types that can be applicable for this port in the current mode.

Struct.name: Card
Struct.help: Structure to hold information about a card in a chassis.

Member.name: portVector
Member.help: List of port structures containing information about all the ports in the card.

Struct.name: XPChassis
Struct.help: Structure to hold the complete information about a Chassis.

Member.name: managementIp
Member.help: Management IP or the base address of the chassis.

Member.name: sequenceNumber
Member.help: A number indicating sequence of the chassis.

Member.name: cardVector
Member.help: List of card strutures containing information about all the cards in the chassis.

Member.name: master
Member.help: boolean indicating whether the chassis is a master.(in a chain).

Enum.name: eTimeSource

Choice.help: Internal timing for chassis.
GPS unit.
CDMA unit.
GPS receiver.

Enum.help: Indicates the source for the time server for a chassis.

Struct.name: XPChassis2
Struct.help: Structure to hold the complete information about a Chassis.

Member.name: managementIp
Member.help: Management IP or the base address of the chassis.

Member.name: sequenceNumber
Member.help: A number indicating sequence of the chassis.

Member.name: cardVector
Member.help: List of card strutures containing information about all the cards in the chassis.

Member.name: master
Member.help: boolean indicating whether the chassis is a master.(in a chain).

Member.name: cableLength
Member.help: Cable Length from previous chassis to the current chassis in a chain.

Member.name: timeSource
Member.help: The time source for the chassis.

Struct.name: Layer1
Struct.help: Structure to hold information to set Layer1 information for the chassis.

Member.name: xml
Member.help: XML string containing information about the layer1 settings.

Struct.name: PackagePort
Struct.help: Structure to hold information on Dod packages to download and the ports to download to..

Member.name: portAddr
Member.help: Port address structure conatining information regarding the port.

Member.name: linkState
Member.help: Whether the link is up or down

Choice.help: Attribute to represent control or data capability.
Packet group attribute representing regular and wide packet group.
Data capture capability.
Media type of the card(copper of fiber).
Attribute to represent Mode of the card.
Speed attribute.
Denotes Control capability.
Denotes data capability.
Denotes regular packet group receive mode capability.
Denotes wide packet group receive mode capability.
Denotes data capture capability.
Denotes card supports copper.
Denotes card supports fiber.
Denotes the card supports generic ethernet.
Denotes the card supports 10 Gigabit LAN.
Denotes the card supports 10 gigabit WAN.
Denotes the card supports ATM.
Denotes the card supports POS.
Denotes the card supports OC 48 POS.
Denotes that the card supports OC 192 POS.
Denotes the card supports 10 Half duplex speed.
Denotes that the card supports 10 Full duplex speed.
Denotes that the card supports 100 Half duplex speed.
Denotes the card supports 100 full duplex speed.
Denotes the card supports Gigabit speed.

Struct.name: CapabilityMatrix
Struct.help: Structure containing an enumerator denoting a particular kind of capability and a boolean that is true if the port has that capability. For example if the enum if kFiber and boolean is true it means the port supports fiber mode.

Member.name: featureCapability
Member.help: Boolean value representing whether the capability value is supported or not.

Struct.name: PortAddressWithProperties
Struct.help: Structure representing the capability values of one port.

Member.name: capabilityVector
Member.help: Capability list containing the information about the capability of the port. The list has one capabilityMatrix for each ePortCapabilityValues enumerator.

Method2.name: EstablishConnection
Method2.help: Make a connection to the hardware manager.

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: List of ports of which to take ownership.

Argument.name: retval
Argument.help: List of ports of which to take ownership.

Method2.name: TakeOwnership
Method2.help: -deprecated- Take the ownership( optionally can force the taking of ownership)of a set of ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: List of ports of which to take ownership.

Argument.name: forced
Argument.help: Whether ownership should be taken forced.

Method2.name: ClearOwnership
Method2.help: -deprecated- Clear the ownership( optionally can force the clearing of ownership)of a set of ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: List of ports of which to clear ownership.

Argument.name: forced
Argument.help: Whether ownership should be force cleared.

Method2.name: TakeOwnership_V2
Method2.help: Take the ownership( optionally can force the taking of ownership) of a set of ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: List of ports of which to take ownership.

Argument.name: forced
Argument.help: Whether ownership should be taken forced.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that could not be taken.

Method2.name: ClearOwnership_V2
Method2.help: Take the ownership( optionally can force the taking of ownership)of a set of ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: List of ports of which to take ownership.

Argument.name: forced
Argument.help: Whether ownership should be taken forced.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that could not be cleared.

Method2.name: GetPortInformation
Method2.help: Get the current port information such as speed, link state etc., for a set of ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to get information.

Argument.name: portInfo
Argument.help: Reference to the port info structure.

Method2.name: ResetPortCpu
Method2.help: Reboot the port CPU

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to reboot.

Method2.name: ResetPortCpu_V2
Method2.help: Reboot the port CPU

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to reboot.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that failed to reboot.

Method2.name: SetFactoryDefaults
Method2.help: Set the settings on the ports back to what was in factory defaults.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of Ports to set the factory defaults.

Method2.name: SetFactoryDefaults_V2
Method2.help: Set the settings on the ports back to what was in factory defaults.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of Ports to set the factory defaults.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that failed to set to factory defaults.

Method2.name: SetModeDefaults
Method2.help: Set the settings on the ports back to what was in mode defaults.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of Ports to set the factory defaults.

Method2.name: SetModeDefaults_V2
Method2.help: Set the settings on the ports back to what was in mode defaults.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of Ports to set the mode defaults.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that failed to set to mode defaults.

Method2.name: ConfigurePhysical
Method2.help: Configure layer1 information on the ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Ports to write the changes to.

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The string containing the xml data.

Method2.name: SetBaseAddress
Method2.help: Method to set the base management ip address used for the ports.

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: DNS name of the chassis.

Argument.name: baseIpAddress
Argument.help: Base IP address to set to.

Method2.name: WriteChangesToPort
Method2.help: Method to enforce changes on the IxServer after making changes to a port via the chPort structure.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Ports to write the changes to.

Method2.name: ClearPcpuGrpTimeStamp
Method2.help: Method to synchronize the time stamp on ports even within a chassis.

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: Dns name or IP address of the Chassis.

Method2.name: StartCapture
Method2.help: Method to start capture on ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to start capture

Method2.name: StopCapture
Method2.help: Method to stop capture on ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to stop capture

Method2.name: StartTransmit
Method2.help: Method to start transmsit.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to start transmit.

Method2.name: StopTransmit
Method2.help: Method to stop transmsit.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to stop transmit.

Method2.name: StartLatency
Method2.help: Method to start latency on ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to start latency

Method2.name: StopLatency
Method2.help: Method to stop latency on ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to stop latency

Method2.name: ClearTimeStamp
Method2.help: Method to clear all time stamps in order to synchronize the time stamps throughout the chassis chain.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to clear the timestamps.

Method2.name: SwitchToCapture
Method2.help: Method to switch the ports to capture mode.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to switch to capture mode.

Method2.name: SwitchToPacketGroup
Method2.help: Method to switch the ports to packet groups mode.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to switch to packet groups mode.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that failed to switch to packets .

Method2.name: SwitchToWidePacketGroup
Method2.help: Method to switch the ports to wide packet groups mode.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to switch to wide packet groups mode.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that failed to switch to wide packets.

Method2.name: SwitchToPacketStreams
Method2.help: Method to switch the ports to packet streams mode.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to switch to packet streams mode.

Method2.name: SwitchToAdvancedScheduler
Method2.help: Method to switch to advanced streams scheduler mode.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to switch to advanced streams scheduler mode.

Method2.name: SimulateLinkState
Method2.help: Method to simulate the link (up and down).

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to simulate the link.

Argument.name: linkStateUp
Argument.help: TRUE if you want to have the link up and FALSE if simulate cable disconnect

Method2.name: SetCaptureFile
Method2.help: Method to write the capture buffer to a file.

Argument.name: port
Argument.help: the port.

Argument.name: numPackets
Argument.help: Number of packets to retrieve.

Argument.name: exportFileName
Argument.help: File name of the exported file capture buffer.

Method2.name: SetCaptureFile_V2
Method2.help: Method to write the capture buffer to a file.

Argument.name: port
Argument.help: the port.

Argument.name: numPackets
Argument.help: Number of packets to retrieve.

Argument.name: fileFormat
Argument.help: Format of the file.

Argument.name: outFile
Argument.help: file on the client with capture buffer

Method2.name: ImportPrtFile_V2
Method2.help: Method to import a port configuration to a list of ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to import the file.

Argument.name: inFile
Argument.help: file port configuration

Method2.name: GetPortMemory
Method2.help: Method for getting the memory of a port.

Argument.name: port
Argument.help: the port.

Argument.name: mbytes
Argument.help: number of Mbytes of the CPU port.

Method2.name: GetMemory
Method2.help: Method for getting the memory of a list of port.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to switch to advanced streams scheduler mode.

Argument.name: mbytesVector
Argument.help: list of number of Mbytes of the CPU ports.

Method2.name: FileBeginDownLoad
Method2.help: Method to signify beginning upload a File to the test server.This method must be used in conjunction with FileUploadSegment and FileEndDonwload.

Argument.name: filename
Argument.help: Name of the file.

Argument.name: sessionId
Argument.help: Session ID for upload the fileto tgest server.

Method2.name: FileUploadSegment
Method2.help: Method to upload a segment to testServer. This method must be called using the sessionID obtained by a call to FileBeginDownload methof.

Argument.name: sessionID
Argument.help: The session ID for the upload.

Argument.name: segment
Argument.help: The bytes containing the file segment.

Method2.name: FileEndDownLoad
Method2.help: Method to indicate that the file upload is complete.

Argument.name: sessionID
Argument.help: The session ID for the upload.

Method2.name: ImportPrtFile
Method2.help: Method to import a prt file.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to import the file

Argument.name: sessionID
Argument.help: Session ID for importing the file.

Argument.name: retval
Argument.help: Return value of the method. If true, indicates success.

Method2.name: GetChassisTopology
Method2.help: Get the complete information about the topology of the chassis, including card and port information.

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: Dns name or IP address of the Chassis.

Argument.name: chassis
Argument.help: Reference to the structure containing the chassis topology information.

Method2.name: GetDetailedChassisTopology
Method2.help: Get the complete information about the topology of the chassis, including card and port information. This method also returns the capabilities of each of the ports in the chassis.

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: Dns name or IP address of the Chassis.

Argument.name: chassis
Argument.help: Reference to the structure containing the chassis topology information.

Argument.name: portVec
Argument.help: Reference to the structure containing the Port capabilities information.

Method2.name: CreateChassisChain
Method2.help: Creates the chassis chain the chassis using the configured chassis chain information.

Method2.name: EstablishChassisConnection
Method2.help: EstablishConnection to the chassis

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: DNS name of the chassis.

Argument.name: retval
Argument.help: DNS name of ip address of the connected chassis. If already connected with a different alias, returns that alias.

Method2.name: ClearStatistics
Method2.help: Method to start transmsit.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to clear statistics.

Method2.name: ClearStatistics_V2
Method2.help: Method to clear statistics. The method returns also the ports on which stats could not be cleared.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to clear statistics.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that could not be cleared of statistics.

Method2.name: GetNicVector
Method2.help: Returns the list of Nics for a particular port

Argument.name: uniquePortId
Argument.help: Port id for which the Nics are required

Argument.name: nics
Argument.help: Vector representing Nics

Method2.name: SetFactoryDefaultsForNics
Method2.help: Set the factory defaults

Argument.name: nics
Argument.help: Nics for which the settings are to be made

Method2.name: ConfigurePhysicalForNics
Method2.help: Configure physical properties for Nics

Argument.name: nics
Argument.help: Vector of nics

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: xml file that contains the configuration information.

Method2.name: StartTrafficGeneration
Method2.help: Method to invoke a set of methods on a list of ports. This is a wrapper method that calls StopTransmit, StopLatency, ClearStatistics, ClearTimeStamp.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to call the wrapper API on.

Method2.name: InvokeTranslatorModuleFunc
Method2.help: Method to invoke a translator module function in a chassis.

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: Hostname of the chassis to talk to.

Argument.name: xml_in
Argument.help: xml file to be sent to the translator Module

Argument.name: xmlStream
Argument.help: xml file response from the translator Module

Method2.name: DownloadPackagesToPorts
Method2.help: Method to download one package to a set of ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: List of ports to download to.

Argument.name: File
Argument.help: Package to download.

Argument.name: fileName
Argument.help: Package name to download.

Method2.name: DeletePackagesFromPorts
Method2.help: Method to delete packages from a set of ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: List of ports to delete packages from.

Argument.name: packages
Argument.help: Package to delete.

Method2.name: InvokeTranslatorModuleFuncWithCompression
Method2.help: Method to call Translator module with compressed input and output streams.

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: Hostname of the chassis.

Argument.name: xml_in
Argument.help: Compressed xml file stream to be sent to the translator Module

Argument.name: xmlStream
Argument.help: Compressed xml file stream received from the translator Module.

Method2.name: RebootPortCpuAndBlockUntilReady
Method2.help: Method to reboot the ports and then check if the ports are all ready.Method returns when all ports are ready.

Argument.name: portsIn
Argument.help: Set of ports to reboot and check for status.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that could not be rebooted.

Method2.name: ConfigurePhysical_V2
Method2.help: Configure layer1 information on the ports and return failed ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Ports to write the changes to.

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The string containing the xml data.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports that could not be set with Layer1 partamters.

Method2.name: PingChassis
Method2.help: Try connecting to chassis and see if it is up and Ixserver is also up

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: The string containing the chassisHostname.

Argument.name: retval
Argument.help: Return value of the method. If true, indicates success.

Method2.name: GetPortInformation_V2
Method2.help: Get the current port information such as speed, link state etc., for a set of ports. Return the failed ports.

Argument.name: ports
Argument.help: Set of ports to get port information.

Argument.name: portInfo
Argument.help: Reference to the port info structure.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports for which port information could not be obtained.

Method2.name: GetFailedPortsForLayer1
Method2.help: Method to obtain failed ports from ConfigLayer_V2 through TestConfigure method.

Argument.name: portsFailed
Argument.help: List of ports for Layer1 failed.

Method2.name: RemoveChassisConnectionCache
Method2.help: Remove Chassis Connection Cache from testserver.

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: DNS name of the chassis.

Method2.name: GetVersion
Method2.help: Returns the PCDAP version

Argument.name: machineIp
Argument.help: Machine ip.

Argument.name: version
Argument.help: PCDAP version for the given machine ip

Method2.name: GetManagementNicVector
Method2.help: Returns a vector of nic addresses

Argument.name: machineIp
Argument.help: Machine ip

Argument.name: nicVector
Argument.help: Vector of nic addresses

Method2.name: SetHostname
Method2.help: Sets the host name for the given pcdap machine

Argument.name: machineIp
Argument.help: Machine ip

Argument.name: hostname
Argument.help: Hostname to be set

Method2.name: SetDnsServer
Method2.help: Sets the dns server for the given pcdap machine

Argument.name: machineIp
Argument.help: Machine ip

Argument.name: dnsServer
Argument.help: Hostname to be set

Method2.name: GetHardwareManagerBuildVersion
Method2.help: Gets the version

Argument.name: machineIp
Argument.help: Machine ip

Argument.name: version
Argument.help: Version

Method2.name: SetDhcp
Method2.help: Sets the nic to use DHCP

Argument.name: nicAddress
Argument.help: Nic address

Method2.name: SetStaticIp
Method2.help: Sets the nic to use static ip

Argument.name: nicAddress
Argument.help: Nic address

Argument.name: ip
Argument.help: Ip

Argument.name: netmask
Argument.help: Netmask

Argument.name: gateway
Argument.help: Gateway

Method2.name: GetKernelCrashDump
Method2.help: Returns the last kernel crash dump

Argument.name: machineIp
Argument.help: Machine ip

Argument.name: crashDump
Argument.help: Kernel crash dump

Method2.name: CPDConfigurePhysical
Method2.help: Configures the physical properties

Argument.name: nicAddressVector
Argument.help: Nic addresses

Argument.name: configuration
Argument.help: Configuration to be set

Method2.name: DoesChassisSupportMultiNic
Method2.help: Returns true if the chassis is a PCDAP.

Argument.name: chassisHostName
Argument.help: Dns name or IP address of the Chassis.

Argument.name: retVal
Argument.help: Return value.

Method2.name: GetIxOSVersion
Method2.help: Returns the IxosVersion at the specified chassis address

Argument.name: machineIp
Argument.help: Chassis Address.

Argument.name: version
Argument.help: IXOS version

Method2.name: SetDelayStartTransmitTime
Method2.help: Set the number of seconds to delay test application after a start. Applicable for chassis chain.

Argument.name: masterChassisIp
Argument.help: The master of the chassis chain.

Argument.name: delay
Argument.help: The delay value to be set.

Method2.name: GetDelayStartTransmitTime
Method2.help: Get the number of seconds to delay test application after a start. Applicable for chassis chain.

Argument.name: masterChassisIp
Argument.help: The master of the chassis chain.

Argument.name: delay
Argument.help: The return value.

Method2.name: GetChassisTimeSource
Method2.help: Get the source for the time server of the chassis.

Argument.name: chassisIp
Argument.help: The chassis IP.

Argument.name: source
Argument.help: The return value.
